Internal Launch Strategies
Module 6
The Internal Launch…
• This is a launch just to your list
• No affiliates or JV Partners
• This is the classic Sideways Sales Letter™ launch
• Three pieces of Prelaunch Content that lead
into a sales letter
The Internal Launch…
• This is more work than a Seed Launch or Quick
Launch but you get better results
• The Internal Launch is much simpler than a big JV
Launch
• You create that Sideways Sales Letter and do your
Internal Launch
• Then you can take that same launch (those assets)
and re-use them in the JV Launch
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
The Internal Launch…
• I would caution against skipping right to the JV
Launch
• The JV Launch is 2x more work than an Internal
Launch
• This is the real “bread and butter” in the PLF
world
• I consider them “elegant” launches – where you
have maximum control and they happen on your
time frame
The Internal Launch…
• In an Internal Launch, you mail your list on the
days you release your PLCs – you control exactly
when those emails go out
• In a JV Launch, you have no control when your
partners are going to mail
• You lose some control of the messaging and
the timing in a JV Launch
The Internal Launch…
• I consider them “elegant” launches – where you
have maximum control and they happen on your
time frame
• If you want to do an Internal Launch next Monday
– create your PLC this weekend – you could do it
• (You can’t do that with a JV Launch – you have to
plan a JV Launch on a much longer timeframe)
• It’s good to do your internal launch first and test
out your PLC before bringing in JV Partners
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
How big should your list be to do an
Internal Launch?
• 3-400 hundred people, but… it depends
• If you have a high priced product, you can
generate enough sales to make the launch
attractive
• If your product is lower priced, you might want a
bigger list to make it worthwhile
• Bigger markets tend to have lower-priced
products
• Smaller markets tend to have higher-priced
products
How long between the Seed Launch and
Internal Launch?
• Typically about 3 months
• The real answer is once you start to do these
launches and get a feel for it, you’ll know how
long you need and what your list will allow
Can you skip the Seed Launch and go right
to an Internal Launch?
• Absolutely, especially if you have your product
done already and you have a bigger list, then you
can go straight to an Internal Launch
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Can you do an Internal Launch to a cold
list?
• If you warm your list first, then you can do an
Internal Launch to them
